title: Comodule Structures, Equivariant Hopf Structures, and Generalized Schubert Polynomials
abstract: In this article, the comodule structure of Chow rings of Flag manifolds $\operatorname{CH}(G/B)$ is described by Schubert cells. Its equivariant version gives rise to a Hopf structure of the equivariant cohomology of flag manifolds $H^*_B(G/B)$. We get two identities of generalized Schubert polynomials as explanations of the geometric facts.
comment: Problem of signs in the previous version are corrected
